tags.description: Kalingarayan Canal is a 90km long irrigation canal in the Erode district, Tamil Nadu, India. It was constructed by Kongu chieftain Kalingarayan and was completed in 1283. Starts: Kalingarayan dam on River Bhavani, Ends: Kodumudi.
